payments.successDescription: Your Stripe account is now connected and ready to receive payments in 24h !

paymentDetails.title: Payment Details
paymentDetails.stripeDescription: Connect your Stripe account to receive patient consultation payments. Esthetic Match keeps 15% commission and the remaining amount is paid to you.
paymentDetails.connected: Stripe is connected and ready to receive payments.
paymentDetails.onboardingIncomplete: Stripe account created. Please complete onboarding to receive payments.
paymentDetails.notConnected: Connect Stripe before receiving consultation payments.
paymentDetails.currencyDescription: Choose the currency patients will see when booking consultations with you.

topThreeNote: Your top three procedures will be highlighted on your profile and used to match you with patients looking for those specific procedures.

common.notAvailable: Procedure mismatch please reset your category and procedure selections to view your procedures

topProceduresModal.title: Edit Top 3 Procedures
topProceduresModal.description: Choose up to 3 procedures from your selected procedures.
topProceduresModal.empty: You need to select procedures before choosing your top three.

proceduresModal.title: Edit Categories & Procedures
proceduresModal.description: Select procedures under your chosen categories.
proceduresModal.emptyCategories: Select a category to view its linked procedures.

doctorEditProfile.title: Edit Profile
doctorEditProfile.noTopThree: You have not selected your top three procedures yet.

subscriptionSuccess.title: Subscription activated
subscriptionSuccess.description: Your premium plan is now active. Your profile features and visibility have been upgraded successfully.
subscriptionSuccess.body: You can now manage your premium profile, booking links, gallery, Google reviews, and public visibility from your dashboard.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.warningDescription: Deleting your account will permanently remove your profile, saved data, consultations, messages, gallery content, and all information associated with your account.

modal.title: Are you absolutely sure?
modal.description: This will permanently delete your account and everything connected to it. You will not be able to recover it later.
